name: zero-agents
description: ZeroAgent framework - Self-evolving agents with 0G storage

scripts.test:live: pnpm --filter @zero-agents/core build && tsx scripts/test-storage.ts && tsx scripts/test-ens-identity.ts && tsx -e "process.env.ZERO_AGENT_LIVE_TEST='1'; await import('./scripts/test-agent.ts')"
scripts.test:unit: tsx packages/core/src/__tests__/sandbox.test.ts && tsx packages/core/src/__tests__/evaluator.test.ts && tsx packages/core/src/__tests__/errors.test.ts && tsx packages/core/src/__tests__/coordinator-safety.test.ts && tsx packages/core/src/__tests__/tool-registry.test.ts && tsx packages/core/src/__tests__/axl-client.test.ts && tsx packages/core/src/__tests__/agent-strategy.test.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @zero-agents/core build && pnpm --filter @zero-agents/demo-agent build && pnpm --filter @zero-agents/dashboard build
